# C Language

A comprehensive guide to the C programming language, from basic syntax to advanced topics like pointers, data structures, and file operations.

## Recommended Reading Order

1. [C 程序结构与基础语法](/notes/c-program-structure/) — Program structure and basic syntax
2. [C 常量、变量与存储方式](/notes/c-constants-variables-storage/) — Constants, variables, and storage
3. [C 数据类型](/notes/c-data-types/) — Data types
4. [C 运算符](/notes/c-operators/) — Operators
5. [C 格式化输入输出与字符读写](/notes/c-io/) — Formatted I/O and character reading/writing
6. [C 数组](/notes/c-arrays/) — Arrays
7. [C 函数](/notes/c-functions/) — Functions
8. [C 指针](/notes/c-pointers/) — Pointers
9. [C 执行输出控制](/notes/c-control-flow/) — Control flow (if/else, switch, loops)
10. [条件运算符与循环控制](/notes/c-conditional-loop-control/) — Conditional operator and loop control
11. [链表](/notes/c-linked-list/) — Linked lists
12. [C 自建数据类型](/notes/c-custom-types/) — Custom data types (struct, union, enum, typedef)
13. [C 文件操作](/notes/c-file-operations/) — File operations
